item.title: Nursing Theory Conference 2019
item.description: Oral Presentation; March 20-21, 2019; The Glidden House; Cleveland, OH (Pictures: Callista Roy and Peggy Chinn. With Korean nursing scholars)

item.title: HFSA 22nd Annual Scientific Meeting
